mapper.select: select * from products where status = 'APPROVED' order by product_id desc limit #{start}, #{blockList}
mapper.insert: insert into products ( seller_id, category_id, name, description, price, sale_price, stock, delivery_fee, free_shipping, status, image_l, image_s, sale_price_updated_at ) values ( #{seller_id}, #{category_id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{sale_price}, #{stock}, #{delivery_fee}, #{free_shipping}, #{status}, #{image_l}, #{image_s}, case when #{sale_price} > 0 then current_timestamp else null end )
mapper.select: select count(*) from products where status = 'APPROVED'
select * from products where status = 'APPROVED' order by product_id desc limit #{start}, #{blockList}
select * from products where status = 'APPROVED' and category_id = #{category_id} order by product_id desc limit #{start}, #{blockList}
select count(*) from products where status = 'APPROVED' and category_id = #{category_id}
select * from products where status = 'APPROVED' and sale_price>0 order by sale_price_updated_at desc, product_id desc limit #{start}, #{blockList}
select count(*) from products where status = 'APPROVED' and sale_price > 0
